PowerShell(cd "C:\\Users\\Jonathan Costa\\Desktop\\Prescreve-AI\\frontend"; npx tsx src/lib/simulation-phase22-3.ts 2>&1 | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\Users\\Jonathan Costa\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\sim-result.json" -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "Done. Exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; Get-Item "C:\\Users\\Jonathan Costa\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\sim-result.json" | Select-Object Length)

PowerShell($r = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Jonathan Costa\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\sim-result.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "=== SUMMARY ==="; Write-Host "Total: $\($r.summary.total\)"; Write-Host "Passed: $\($r.summary.passed\)"; Write-Host "Failed: $\($r.summary.failed\)"; Write-Host "Pass rate: $\($r.summary.pass_rate\)"; Write-Host "Total errors: $\($r.summary.totalErrors\)"; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== BY CATEGORY ==="; $r.by_category.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { $v=$_.Value; Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): total=$\($v.n\) ok=$\($v.ok\) errors=$\($v.errors\)" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== ERROR LOG \(first 30\) ==="; $r.error_log | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.id\)] $\($_.patient\) >> $\($_.error\)" })

PowerShell($r = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Jonathan Costa\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\sim-result.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "=== STEP STATS \(errors only\) ==="; $r.step_stats.PSObject.Properties | Where-Object { $_.Value.error -gt 0 } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): ok=$\($_.Value.ok\) error=$\($_.Value.error\)" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== TOP STEPS \(ok calls\) ==="; $r.step_stats.PSObject.Properties | Sort-Object { $_.Value.ok } -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Name\): ok=$\($_.Value.ok\)" }; Write-Host ""; Write-Host "=== SAMPLE PATIENTS \(first 5\) ==="; $r.patients | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.id\)] $\($_.patient\) — passed=$\($_.passed\) steps=$\($_.steps\) ms=$\($_.ms\)" })
